message:
feat: resolve cross-database deps via prefix routes in bd show/graph/blocked (bd-k0pfm)

When bd show renders dependencies that reference external databases
(e.g., 'external:gastown:gt-42zaq'), it now follows the prefix routes
in routes.jsonl to locate and query the target database, displaying
the actual issue title, status, and priority instead of silently
dropping them.

The core fix adds resolveExternalDepsViaRouting() which:
1. Gets raw dependency records to find external refs
2. Extracts the issue ID from each external ref
3. Uses routing to look up the issue in the target database
4. Returns resolved IssueWithDependencyMetadata entries

Applied to: bd show (text + JSON), bd show --watch, bd graph, bd blocked.
Unresolvable external deps show as placeholders rather than being dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
